title: Ninnu Kori
notes: Varnam by Ramnad Sreenivasa Iyengar in Mohanam; Adi tala; pallavi 'ninnu kori yunna nura nikila loka nayaka'; mudra 'Sreenivasa'; one of the standard Mohanam varnams in the concert repertoire; note: the tracklist of the Jamshedpur 1961 concert attributes this to 'Poochi Srinivasa Iyengar' — the shivkumar.org notation source explicitly names Ramnad Sreenivasa Iyengar as composer
